detail: Starting epic-grooming story implementation. EDD order: write evals first, then SKILL.md/workflow.md. Tasks: epic-template, SKILL.md, workflow.md (4 phases).

Task 1 complete: epic-template.md created at skills/momentum/references/templates/epic-template.md. Template has all 7 fields: slug, category, strategic intent, boundaries, FRs covered, NFRs covered, current state. Aligns with existing epics.md body format.

Tasks 2+3 complete: SKILL.md created (92-char description, model: claude-sonnet-4-6, effort: high). workflow.md created with 4 phases: data collection, taxonomy analysis, developer review, apply changes. 167 lines total.

EDD eval cycle complete. All 3 evals pass: (1) orphan identification separated from proposals by discrete phase boundary; (2) approval gate enforced via critical constraint + check-if-no-proposals block; (3) per-change logging + epic-membership calls verified for all MERGE/CREATE/SPLIT types.
